name: Alexandru cel Bun
osm_method: polygon overlay for green OSM tags
sentinel2_source: Sentinel-2 L2A via Sentinel Hub Process API
sentinel2_method: NDVI = (B08 - B04) / (B08 + B04), green pixel threshold NDVI >= 0.30
worldcover_method: zonal histogram over ESA WorldCover classes 10, 20, 30, 40, 90, 95
copernicus_cgls_source: Copernicus Global Land Cover CGLS-LC100 via Google Earth Engine
copernicus_cgls_method: mean cover fractions over zone polygon
sources_used: ESA WorldCover; Sentinel-2 NDVI; OpenStreetMap; Copernicus CGLS
